factionKeywords.name: Ork
factionKeywords.description: This model is an Ork. Required for Ork-targeting auras such as Waaagh! and Breakin' 'Eads!.

factionKeywords.name: Grot
factionKeywords.description: This model is a Grot. Required for Grot-targeting auras.

rules.name: No Changes
rules.fullDesc: No changes to datasheets in this Codex.

rules.name: Posh Lifestyle
rules.shortDesc: Models may not claim Objective Markers in the enemy deployment zone.
rules.fullDesc: Models in your army may not claim Objective Markers in the enemy deployment zone.

rules.name: Wealthiest Gitz
rules.shortDesc: Models trigger Dakka on a 5+ instead of a 6+ To Hit.
rules.fullDesc: Models in your army trigger Dakka on a 5+ instead of a 6+ To Hit.

rules.name: Sneaky Gitz
rules.shortDesc: All models gain Stealth and Outflank; if already Stealth they gain Shroud instead.
rules.fullDesc: Models in your army gain Stealth and Outflank. If they already have Stealth they gain Shroud.

rules.name: Survivors of Da Big Party
rules.shortDesc: All models must reroll successful Ld tests.
rules.fullDesc: Models in your army must reroll successful Ld tests.

rules.name: Grot Warmachines
rules.shortDesc: All Ork-keyword Vehicles and Monsters suffer W-2 but gain BS-1 (Improves).
rules.fullDesc: All Vehicle, Titanic Vehicle, Monsters, and Titanic Monsters with the Ork keyword suffer W-2 but gain BS-1 (Improves by 1).

rules.name: Only Grots
rules.shortDesc: Army may not include Ork keyword units that are not Vehicles or Monsters.
rules.fullDesc: This army may not include any Ork keyword units that are not Vehicle, Titanic Vehicle, Monsters, or Titanic Monsters.

rules.name: Hurry Up and Loot
rules.shortDesc: Must declare Charges if able; may not fire Heavy Weapons or Advance if it would prevent a legal Charge.
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army must declare Charges if they can legally do so, and may not do anything such as fire Heavy Weapons or Advance if it would compromise a legal Charge that is in range.

rules.name: Scavenging Gitz
rules.shortDesc: Each unit gains one Looted Die per W# of each model it slays; use to reroll To Hit (no rerolling rerolls).
rules.fullDesc: Each unit in your army gains one Looted Die for each W# of each model it slays. Looted Dice may be used to reroll any To Hit die in relation to this unit, but you cannot reroll a reroll.

rules.name: Hyper ADHD Gitz
rules.shortDesc: Infantry models count as half a model for contesting Objective Markers.
rules.fullDesc: Infantry models in your army only count as half a model for purposes of contesting an Objective Marker.

rules.name: Speed Freeks
rules.shortDesc: All Vehicles gain M+2; Aircraft may turn 90° after firing in the Shooting Phase.
rules.fullDesc: All Vehicles gain M+2. Aircraft may turn 90 degrees after firing in the Shooting Phase as well as before moving in the Movement Phase.

rules.name: Pirate Gitz
rules.shortDesc: All Infantry models gain Objective Secured.
rules.fullDesc: All Infantry models in your army gain Objective Secured.

rules.name: Lurking Pirates
rules.shortDesc: Entire army must deploy in Reserves, even if normally prohibited.
rules.fullDesc: Your entire army must deploy in Reserves, even if it is normally not allowed to do so.

rules.name: Goff is Da Best
rules.shortDesc: All models may reroll 1s To Hit in Melee.
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army may reroll 1s To Hit in Melee.

rules.name: Obnoxious Gitz
rules.shortDesc: Infantry models count as half a model for contesting Objective Markers.
rules.fullDesc: Infantry models in your army only count as half a model for purposes of contesting an Objective Marker.

rules.name: Feral Gitz
rules.shortDesc: No Vehicle models allowed; all models gain M+2.
rules.fullDesc: This army may not field any Vehicle models, but all models gain M+2.

rules.name: Tough Squiggitz
rules.shortDesc: Infantry, Monstrous Infantry, Monsters, and Titanic Monsters inflict -2 To Wound on Poisoned weapons rolling against them.
rules.fullDesc: Infantry, Monstrous Infantry, Monsters, and Titanic Monsters inflict a -2 To Wound on Poisoned (#+) weapons rolling To Wound them.

rules.name: Poisonous Fauna
rules.shortDesc: All Squig keyword models gain Poisoned (3+) on Melee weapons.
rules.fullDesc: All Squig keyword models in your army gains Poisoned (3+) on its Melee weapons.
